sql_skeletons.sql_shape: SELECT T.id_col, T.name_col FROM entity_table T ... LIMIT 50
sql_skeletons.when_to_use: list names, ids, or display values for local entities

common_mistakes: do not use name column for distinct count
sql_skeletons.sql_shape: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.id_col) AS count FROM entity_table T ...
sql_skeletons.when_to_use: how many unique entities or local rows by entity identity

common_mistakes: do not select non-aggregated columns with count
sql_skeletons.sql_shape: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM entity_table T ...
sql_skeletons.when_to_use: how many rows when no stable entity id column exists
